title: Assistant Store Manager - Lifestyle - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Lifestyle - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Lifestyle! We are hiring a Assistant Store Manager for our Faridabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Lifestyle:
Lifestyle is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lifestyle!
